noAgentAvailableShort: No Main Agent available. Click to configure.

collaborators.title: Collaborator models
collaborators.label: Collaborators
collaborators.emptyHint: The main model is always in the pool; add collaborators to let it offload simpler tasks to cheaper models by difficulty.
collaborators.selectedHint: Pool = main model + {{count}} collaborator(s); the main model assigns each node by difficulty, balancing cost and quality.

approval.title: Approval mode
approval.desc: Pause on key decisions and wait for you.

scanning.initialMessage: Current Agent is unavailable, detecting other available agents...

advanced.applyNote: Applied automatically once the conversation is created.
advanced.applyFailed: Failed to apply {{feature}} — you can re-enable it inside the conversation.

entry.skillsActiveAria: View {{count}} Skills enabled for this chat
entry.clusterHint: Multi-agent teamwork: the lead agent deliberately evaluates and splits work across independent agents; trivial tasks get a stated reason and a direct answer.

skillsPopover.title: Skills used in this chat
skillsPopover.description: These Skills are injected into this chat. Use “Use Skills” to adjust them before sending.
skillsPopover.adjustHint: Click “Use Skills” to adjust this chat.

drawer.presetHint: Choose one preset; the backend resolves and snapshots it for this conversation.
